body:
## Summary
- centralize Home copy e2e setup around shared route setup, console/page error collection, and top-bar language switching helpers
- add source-contract coverage so Home copy specs keep using the shared helpers instead of local launch/modal code
- fix the Swedish Home subtitle to singular `svensk samhällskunskap` and add content guards for unreachable flashcard copy, plural subject wording, synthetic learner feedback, guided-path chapter drift, and native `övningsprovet` wording

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern "Home copy specs" tests/e2e/e2e-source-contract.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-home-route-header-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-home-route-copy`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' timeout 300s npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' timeout 180s npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/home-study-loop-copy.spec.ts tests/e2e/home-sv-mistake-review-copy.spec.ts --workers=1`
- `git diff --check`
title: test: centralize Home e2e setup
